features.name: Environment & Data Download
features.description: Verify uv environment installs, data download script works, and basic AnnData reads succeed on the DE stats file
features.evidence: Env imports OK (anndata 0.13.1, mudata 0.3.10, h5py 3.16.0). Aggregate layer downloaded and verified: data/raw ~101 GB — 4 HDF5 (DE 16.8 / pseudobulk 44.6 / by_guide 29.4 / by_donors 16.9 GB), 15 suppl tables, 12 Croissant jsonld. README download steps extended: S3 sync for on-S3 suppl+metadata, GitHub fetch for the 12 analysis tables not on S3. init.sh passes (compileall clean). Backed AnnData reads confirmed via examples/inspect_de_stats.py. Cell-level files intentionally excluded (storage-blocked).

features.name: Data Inspection & ID Mapping
features.description: Load DE stats and pseudobulk AnnData/MuData objects, extract obs/var tables, build Ensembl-HGNC-UniProt-Entrez identifier mapping with ambiguity reporting
features.evidence: Inspection DONE: examples/ has one self-checking inspector per artifact (DE, pseudobulk, guide/donor MuData, core + derived suppl tables, jsonld) plus dataset_overview.py. Verified facts: DE .X empty, 6 dense float64 layers (33983x10282); pseudobulk CSR 278684x18129 is the only NTC-control source (DE has none); donor key = physical CE codes (D#<->CE consistent); 4.9% guide designed!=validated target; q_post leakage fields identified. STILL TODO: Ensembl-HGNC-UniProt-Entrez mapping table with one-to-many/unmapped/deprecated ambiguity report.

features.name: Leakage-Safe Train/Val/Test Splits
features.description: Construct splits that block gene families, protein complexes, and close graph neighborhoods from leaking between train and test; hash and freeze split files

features.name: PPI Graph Construction
features.description: Download and harmonize typed protein interaction edges from BioPlex, HuRI, BioGRID, STRING, and CORUM with full provenance; build merged heterogeneous graph table

features.name: Latent Program Extraction
features.description: Fit fold-local program bases (sparse PCA, NMF, ICA, shallow VAE) at 64/128/256/512 dims on training data only; compare on reconstruction, sparsity, and stability

features.name: Simple Baselines
features.description: Implement no-effect, condition-mean, ridge, elastic-net, nearest-neighbor, low-rank, and CatBoost baselines with common output schema

features.name: Graph Baselines
features.description: Implement network propagation, untyped GNN, and typed static graph baselines using the PPI graph from feat-004

features.name: EG-IPG Model Implementation
features.description: Implement the full EG-IPG architecture: perturbation encoder, typed condition-gated graph encoder, program decoder with residual pathway, and sparse predictive-rationale head

features.name: Evaluation Metrics
features.description: Implement MAE, RMSE, Pearson/Spearman correlation, Systema perturbation-specific metrics, centroid accuracy, top-k recall, and signed-DE F1 with two independent implementations that agree on a fixture

features.name: External Comparators
features.description: Adapt Stable-Shift and TxPert-public to the same data format, splits, and output schema; document compatibility and license status

features.name: Model Screening & Ablations
features.description: Run registered screening across the nested family: expression-only, typed static graph, condition-gated typed graph, and full EG-IPG; compare on development metrics

features.name: Predictive-Rationale Audit
features.description: Test necessity, sufficiency, minimality, and stability of returned subgraphs against matched random controls; run structural-OOD diagnostics

features.name: Reproducibility Verification
features.description: Clean-checkout reproduction of preprocessing hashes, final model, and strongest baselines; report REPRODUCIBLE / PARTIALLY / NOT REPRODUCIBLE verdict
